narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 1-B (precinct in Scioto County) has 561 registered voters, with 66.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
